shortDescription: Planning poker, dot voting, and agile estimation for SharePoint and Teams. Session data stays in your site lists—no external backend.
longDescription: Align your team on story points, confidence, and priorities inside Microsoft 365. Sprint Align is a SharePoint-native estimation app with planning poker, dot voting, surveys, join-by-code sessions, facilitator controls, CSV export, and site-level governance. Optional Graph photos, presence, and Azure DevOps import are available via administrator feature flags. Core sessions and votes are stored in SharePoint lists on the host site.
searchKeywords: planning poker agile estimation story points sprint planning scrum dot voting SharePoint Teams

screenshots.caption: Join sessions with a code or start a new estimation workshop from a branded full-page home screen.
Facilitators run rounds, track participation, and reveal team estimates item by item.
Site owners provision lists, set retention, branding, layout, and session-creation rules.

releaseNotes: Sprint Align v1.1.0.0 — marketplace launch with unified Settings, custom branding, full-page layout, six vote types, and SharePoint-native data storage.
